name: goal-prompts
description: Audit briefs for coding agents — 4-phase missions that point your agent at a repo and end in one evidence-backed report each.

plugins.name: goal
plugins.description: The full goal-prompts catalog as /goal:<slug> commands — every brief audits read-only and writes exactly one report file. Start with /goal:audit-triage (it names the audits your repo needs) or /goal:bug-hunt.

plugins.name: design-engine
plugins.description: A portable branding & design engine — brand.json as the single source of brand truth, six design skills, and gate-grade tools (token compiler, WCAG contrast matrix, mark renderer, specimen, screenshot harness). Copy the folder into any repo to port it.
